segments.speaker: HAIDER
segments.line: We've been planning this for weeks, Iqrash. Hadi's got a reputation for being untouchable on the track.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: IQRASH
segments.line: We're not just going to take him down on the track, Haider. We're going to make it personal.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: HADI OFFSCREEN
segments.line: I'm not afraid of you two.
segments.visual_cue: Wide shot of Haider, his red racing jacket highlighted by the alleyway lights, Iqrash's black hoodie blending into the shadows.

segments.speaker: HAIDER
segments.line: Oh, I think you should be.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: HAMMAD
segments.line: Wait, let's not do this. There's an annual car race coming up. Why don't we settle it there?
segments.visual_cue: Hadi steps into the light, his face set with a determined expression, Hadi's sleek blue car parked behind him, the metallic blue paint gleaming in the alleyway lights.

segments.speaker: HAIDER
segments.line: And put ourselves at the mercy of the judges? No way.
segments.visual_cue: Hammad's glasses and grey sweater make him stand out against the dark alleyway, Hadi and Haider exchange a skeptical look.

segments.speaker: HADI
segments.line: I've got the edge I need. Time to take these guys down.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: HAMMAD
segments.line: Good luck, Hadi. I'll be rooting for you.
segments.visual_cue: Hadi's gloved hands tighten the engine bolts, his blue racing suit a stark contrast to the metallic blue car, the garage lights shining down on the car's sleek lines.

segments.speaker: ANNOUNCER VO
segments.line: Welcome to the annual city car race! Your drivers include Hadi in the sleek blue car, Haider in the rugged red car, and many more!
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of ANNOUNCER (V.O.), expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: HADI
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: HAIDER
segments.line: No way! I'm not letting you win!
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of Hadi's hands on the wheel, his blue racing suit a blur as the car drifts around the corner, Haider's rugged red car close behind.

segments.speaker: HADI
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.
